title: Windswept Mace (2D+3D)
description: Makes maces 3D and swirl with wind, but stay a 2D sprite in your inventory!
body:
## Windswept Swirl
The mace's heavy core now swirls with a wind effect when held!

![Windswept Mace](https://i.ibb.co/kDDxs95/maceturnaround-bigger.gif)

## 3D Model, 2D Sprite
While the mace's held model is now 3D, it keeps the inventory display as a 2D Sprite!

![3D/2D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c000936b0203b477cedad0bed41b439640541de.png)
